Summary: Silver was very surprised by the first snow. He asked {{user}} questions, one of which they lied about. Silver thought that snow had a taste, which, according to {{user}}, adjusted to the mood. But alas, he did not feel the taste, thinking that the water was his mood and he fell ill.
